subcodes.title: Words to Arthur Agnew et al, spoken on 1907-04-15
subcodes.first_line: It is a good gathering. Thank God that belivers are gathered around this table from every part, with utmost sincerity, unity and friendship.
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @material and spiritual existence; two books, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @spiritual transformation, @unity; oneness of humanity, @the Kingdom of God [Malakut]
